name: Always Golf Club
about: Always Golf Club is an indoor golf simulator training and entertainment facility with a full-service bar in Westlake, Ohio. Launched in January 2025, the venue is open to the public and provides a comprehensive experience for golfers of all skill levels. The facility features 10 simulator bays equipped with Uneekor EYEXO2 overhead launch monitors and GSPro software, offering a superior gameplay and training experience. Pricing is based on hourly bay rental, with rates typically ranging from $30 to $60 depending on the time of day, day of the week, and season, accommodating both individual players and groups of up to six people per bay. The venue caters to a diverse clientele, from beginners looking to practice to experienced golfers seeking entertainment and competitive play, with additional offerings including lessons, leagues, events, and club fittings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Uneekor EYEXO2 launch monitors with GSPro software provide a superior data-driven training experience
Flexible hourly rental model allows for cost-effective play, with the ability to split costs among groups
Full-service bar and food options available for a complete entertainment experience
Private lessons with detailed video analysis from a PGA-certified instructor for skill improvement
Variety of events and leagues cater to both competitive and social play

food_and_drink.notes: Pizza dinner provided for group events, kitchen available for general dining
Full-service bar with various alcoholic beverages available

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead launch monitor with advanced tracking capabilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or rent them at the facility. They also offer full-bag club fitting services with Cleveland-Srixon golf clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility has a full-service bar and kitchen food options available. External food and drink policies are not explicitly stated, but the venue provides its own dining options.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It typically takes one player 45-60 minutes to finish 18 holes, so a group of 4 golfers should book 3-4 hours total if they all want to play 18 holes together.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Always Golf Club is family-friendly and offers junior golf lessons. They host events that can accommodate families and have a welcoming atmosphere for all ages.
